game_info.title: Rail Runner - Endless Railway Adventure
game_info.concept: An endless running game where players control a character running on three parallel train tracks, swiping left or right to change lanes, up to jump over obstacles, and down to slide under barriers. The game continuously scrolls forward at increasing speeds, spawning trains, barriers, and collectible coins at predetermined intervals that become more frequent and challenging over time.
game_info.description: Sprint through an endless railway adventure where you must navigate three parallel train tracks at breakneck speeds. Dodge oncoming trains, leap over barriers, slide under obstacles, and collect shimmering coins as the world rushes past you. The pace increases relentlessly, testing your reflexes and decision-making. Survive as long as possible while maximizing your score through precise lane changes and quick reactions. Every second counts in this high-speed chase for survival!
game_info.controls:
- LEFT ARROW: Move to the left lane
- RIGHT ARROW: Move to the right lane
- UP ARROW: Jump over low obstacles
- DOWN ARROW: Slide under high barriers
- SPACE: Jump over low obstacles (alternative)
- ENTER: Start the game from the start screen
- ESC: Pause/unpause during gameplay
- R: Return to start screen from game over

TEST_1.test_description: Testing the optimal survival strategy to achieve the longest running distance and highest score. This validates the core game loop, obstacle spawning system, collision detection, and win condition (surviving as long as possible with high score).
TEST_1.strategy_description: Implement predictive lane switching based on upcoming obstacles. Analyze obstacles in advance and position the player in the safest lane. Jump or slide based on obstacle type. Prioritize survival over coin collection initially, then optimize for coins when safe. Adapt to increasing game speed.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test should achieve a distance of at least 5000 units and collect significant coins without collision. The player should successfully navigate through increasingly difficult obstacle patterns, demonstrating that the game is winnable with skill. The test validates collision detection, controls, and progression mechanics.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing basic movement mechanics and lane switching functionality. Validates that the player can successfully move between all three lanes without getting stuck or experiencing incorrect positioning.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Systematically cycle through all three lanes (left, center, right) repeatedly. Verify position changes are immediate and accurate. Test rapid lane switches and ensure no clipping or invalid states occur.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player position should correctly reflect lane changes with proper x-coordinates for each lane. No collisions should occur from lane switching alone. Movement should be responsive and predictable across all lanes.

TEST_2.expected: Player position should correctly reflect lane changes with proper x-coordinates for each lane. No collisions should occur from lane switching alone. Movement should be responsive and predictable across all lanes.

TEST_3.test_description: Testing jump and slide mechanics to ensure proper vertical movement and collision avoidance. Validates that these actions correctly interact with obstacles and the timing/duration is appropriate.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Deliberately encounter obstacles that require jumping (low barriers) and sliding (high barriers). Execute jumps and slides at various distances from obstacles to test timing windows. Verify that actions complete properly and player returns to normal state.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Jumps should clear low obstacles successfully when timed correctly. Slides should pass under high barriers. Player should return to running state after actions complete. Collision detection should properly account for these states.

TEST_4.test_description: Testing coin collection mechanics and score tracking. Validates that coins are properly detected, collected, and contribute to the player's score accurately.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Actively seek out and collect coins while avoiding obstacles. Navigate to lanes with coins and verify collection triggers properly. Track score increases to ensure proper point attribution.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Each collected coin should increment the score by the expected amount. Coins should disappear upon collection. Score should display correctly and persist throughout the game session.
TEST_4.description: Testing coin collection mechanics and score tracking. Validates that coins are properly detected, collected, and contribute to the player's score accurately.
TEST_4.strategy: Actively seek out and collect coins while avoiding obstacles. Navigate to lanes with coins and verify collection triggers properly. Track score increases to ensure proper point attribution.
TEST_4.expected: Each collected coin should increment the score by the expected amount. Coins should disappear upon collection. Score should display correctly and persist throughout the game session.

TEST_5.test_description: Testing game progression and difficulty scaling. Validates that game speed increases appropriately over time and obstacle patterns become more challenging.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Survive for an extended period while monitoring game speed and obstacle density. Observe how the difficulty curve affects gameplay. Adapt strategy as speed increases.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Game speed should gradually increase based on distance traveled. Obstacles should spawn more frequently as the game progresses. The game should remain challenging but fair, with skilled play allowing extended survival.
